purpose: Current STT release status only. Historical/superseded proof chatter intentionally pruned from active reports.

cloud.reason: Cloud baseline is near corrected AssemblyAI target and is the paid quality path. Current-head deployed smoke passed; standard-filler keyterms work is stopped by product decision.
cloud.next: Pause further Cloud work until Native/Private blockers move, unless product explicitly requests a richer baseline metrics proof.

private_v2.reason: 2026-06-04 human proof after explicit setup consent produced 56.36% accuracy / 43.64% WER, missed um, substituted expected main idea/every transcript with memory transcript, and detail transcript was empty before the #29 fix was re-proven. Product bar: Private must meet/beat the better of same-model/drop-in and Native human Chrome mic baseline.
private_v2.next: test-release-agent: rerun same human script on current main to verify #29 detail fix and Fix-A-v2 behavior. @dev-agent: fix content loss/substitution and first-visible draft gating; any Fix-A-v2/VAD/model candidate must be named/flagged and browser-proven against drop-in and Native baseline.

private_v4.reason: Prior browser worker/runtime attempts have not produced a scoreable non-empty save candidate.
private_v4.next: Hold unless product reopens v4 runtime work.

native.reason: 2026-06-04 real Chrome mic proof captured and saved full 55-word script; formatter invoked quickly (853ms, no error, word-preserving) but output still had bad truecasing (Starts Now) and detail transcript was empty before current-main fixes were re-proven.
native.next: test-release-agent: rerun real mic on current main to verify #29 detail fix, truecasing/readability, and trust-label spacing.

latestPrivateDecodeParameterAb.conclusion: Do not ship this anti-hallucination decode configuration. It worsened h1_6; keep current defaults unless dev proposes a new candidate.

privateVadPrototypeGate.requiredFlag: A named runtime flag such as PRIVATE_VAD_PROTOTYPE=1, with candidate thresholds recorded in artifacts.
privateVadPrototypeGate.passRule: Improve or preserve baseline accuracy on h1_6 and the human script, preserve onset/tail words and fillers, and avoid >10% timing regression. Onset clipping, tail loss, or worse semantic substitution fails.

implementationPolicy.fixAV2: Interim RMS/threshold patch only; may ship only with focused browser proof and no h1/human-like guard regression.
implementationPolicy.vad: Intended architecture direction; prototype behind named flag before replacing RMS gating.
implementationPolicy.segmentTrust: Do not ship cosmetic-only segment trust; segment work must move toward real segment-level finalization and saved transcript integrity.
implementationPolicy.privateFormatter: Deferred for release; no Gemini/server formatter and no second local punctuation model unless separately approved.
implementationPolicy.modelPolicy: whisper-tiny.en remains acceptable only if it meets the bar; larger/local models require browser proof of accuracy/timing/download/memory/setup cost.
implementationPolicy.setupCta: Show model size, not estimated setup time.
